# tapps-brain

> Persistent cross-session memory system for AI coding assistants

- Version: 3.14.4
- License: MIT
- Repository: https://github.com/wtthornton/tapps-brain

## Tech stack

- Python >=3.12
- Pydantic v2; PostgreSQL with pgvector HNSW + tsvector FTS (Postgres-only per ADR-007 — SQLite was removed in v3.6 stage 2)
- psycopg[binary,pool] (sync + async pools), sentence-transformers, structlog, opentelemetry-api
- uv for development; hatchling build

## Entry points (console scripts)

- `tapps-brain` → `tapps_brain.cli:app` (CLI: memory ops, profiles, hive admin, project register)
- `tapps-brain-http` → `tapps_brain.http_adapter:main` (HTTP/MCP server on :8080 — `/v1/*`, `/mcp/`, `/admin/*`, `/metrics`)

## Where to read first

- [`README.md`](README.md) — product overview, install, interfaces
- [`AGENTS.md`](AGENTS.md) — contributor quick path (Cursor / automation)
- [`docs/engineering/README.md`](docs/engineering/README.md) — architecture index
- [`docs/guides/getting-started.md`](docs/guides/getting-started.md) — interfaces and workflows
- [`docs/DOCUMENTATION_INDEX.md`](docs/DOCUMENTATION_INDEX.md) — generated map of all docs
- [`CHANGELOG.md`](CHANGELOG.md) — releases

## API surface (approximate)

- Primary package: `tapps_brain` (agent API: `agent_brain.AgentBrain`; storage: `store.MemoryStore`)
- See source under `src/tapps_brain/` and tests under `tests/`

## Layout

```
src/tapps_brain/   # library and CLI/MCP
tests/             # unit, integration, benchmarks
docs/              # guides, engineering, planning
openclaw-plugin/   # OpenClaw plugin package
scripts/           # release, codegen, maintenance
```
